title: Polymates private fantasy league MVP
goal: Turn Polymates into a convincing private fantasy prediction league MVP with live Polymarket discovery, league-approved market whitelisting, invite flow, and admin settlement controls.
successCriteria: Real Polymarket market discovery is wired into the app with fallback behavior
League admins can whitelist/import visible markets into their private league flow
League creation and invite flow are represented in the UI
Admin settlement surface exists with concrete resolve/pause actions
Changes are committed and pushed incrementally

constraints.scope: frontend MVP plus backend scaffold; no real-money features
approvalRequiredFor: new external accounts/services beyond GitHub push
real-money, payout, or public posting features
constraints.runtimePreference: continue until done or truly blocked

currentStep: Build-check, commit, and push the goal-mode increment
plan: Wire live Polymarket discovery with graceful fallback
Add league market-set selection and live-market whitelisting UX
checkpoints: Do not drift into real-money or sportsbook features
stopConditions: Blocked by missing credentials or broken build
External API becomes inaccessible and no safe fallback exists

completed: Real Polymarket Gamma API connection added with fallback
League creation and invite flow UI added
state.nextStep: Run build, then commit and push this increment
